scripts.db:migrate:dev: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env dev
scripts.db:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --env prod
scripts.db:drop:local: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --command="DROP TABLE IF EXISTS events; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS daily_stats; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS daily_pages; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS daily_referrers; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS daily_countries; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS daily_browsers; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS daily_devices; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS projects; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS refresh_tokens; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS reset_tokens; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS users; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS d1_migrations;"
scripts.db:seed:local: npx tsx src/scripts/seed.ts && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file=.wrangler/seed/seed.sql
scripts.db:fresh:local: bun db:drop:local && bun db:migrate:local && bun db:seed:local
